days.title: Sentosa Island Adventure
days.weather: Partly cloudy with a chance of afternoon thunderstorms. High 31°C, Low 26°C. Seasonal estimate for June.
activities: Explore Universal Studios Singapore and beach clubs in Sentosa
Visit Siloso Beach for lunch and relaxation
Take the cable car back to mainland Singapore
days.budgetNote: Sentosa attractions can be pricey; consider buying a combo pass. Budget allows for moderate dining.

days.title: Nature and City Highlights
days.weather: Hot and humid with intermittent rain showers. High 32°C, Low 25°C. Seasonal estimate for June.
activities: Morning visit to River Wonders and Bird Paradise
Lunch at Mandai Wildlife Reserve area or nearby
Afternoon trip to Jewel Changi Airport for shopping and the Rain Vortex
days.budgetNote: Wildlife parks require significant budget allocation. Jewel entry is free, but activities inside vary.

days.title: Urban Culture and Business District
days.weather: Clear skies with occasional clouds. High 31°C, Low 26°C. Seasonal estimate for June.
activities: Tour SMU campus and nearby Clarke Quay
Explore Marina Bay Sands and Gardens by the Bay
Dinner with a view of the Supertree Grove light show
days.budgetNote: SMU campus access is generally free. Focus budget on Marina Bay dining and optional Cloud Forest/Flower Dome tickets.

categories.name: Clothing
items: Quick-dry shorts or lightweight trousers (3 pairs)
Waterproof sneakers or trail shoes for hiking/wet conditions
Light layer (cardigan or long-sleeve shirt) for air-conditioned malls and MRT

categories.name: Electronics
items: Waterproof phone case or dry bag

categories.name: Toiletries & Health
items: Face mask (for crowded indoor areas like aquariums)

categories.name: Documents & Money
items: Digital and physical copies of booking confirmations
Some Singapore Dollars cash for small vendors
